_meta.source: Rialto Municipal Code Title 18 (Zoning), via Municode

A-1.notes: Agricultural zone permitting single-family dwellings (R-1A standards), commercial poultry/rabbit raising, horse grazing/training, riding stables, dog kennels, sheep/cattle (max 2 animals per lot <1 ac; +1 per half-acre over 1 ac). One-family dwellings permitted by-right per R-1A regs. Existing improvements may be grandfathered if lot is non-conforming.

R-1A.notes: Single-family residential zone with 10,000 sqft minimum lot. Density = 43560/10000 = 4.36 du/ac. A-1 zone cross-references R-1A for height and yard requirements.

_gp_designations._note: General Plan Land Use designations — NOT zoning. Mapping to allowed density requires verification against Rialto General Plan Land Use Element.

R2.name: Residential 2
R2.typical_range: 5-15 du/ac (typical IE 'medium density' tier — verify against Rialto GP)
R2.source_required: Rialto General Plan Land Use Element
